title: Model Diagnostic Checking Feedback Loop
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of diagnosing a fitted time series model by analyzing its residuals to verify model adequacy and identify necessary improvements.
relationships: Process starts with model specification and estimation
Residuals are extracted from the fitted model
Residuals are analyzed with statistical tests and visual plots
If diagnostics are 'good', the model is deemed adequate
If diagnostics are 'bad', the process returns to the model specification stage for improvement
